demo.name: kubernetes/kubernetes
demo.teaser: Large-scale upstream project with many subsystems, strong reviewer specialization, and obvious hotspot surfaces.

metrics.label: Maintainer concentration
metrics.note: Top maintainers are less dominant overall, but critical subsystems still hinge on a narrow review core.

metrics.label: Contributor expertise signals
metrics.note: A deep bench exists, but expertise is partitioned by subsystem.

metrics.label: Subsystem hotspots
metrics.note: API machinery, controllers, test-infra, and release tooling dominate coordination heat.

dashboard.headline: Subsystem sprawl with highly specialized reviewer clusters.
dashboard.narrative: The investor story is not just repo analytics. Vaglio shows where controller, API machinery, and release engineering knowledge is concentrated, and where agent output needs durable provenance to stay governable.

history.note: Independent changes appear safe locally but begin to accumulate cross-cutting review cost.
Schema, controller, and release concerns converge on the same merge window.
A small reviewer set absorbs most of the remaining uncertainty before release.

metrics.label: Branch stress
metrics.note: Cross-SIG changes amplify review contention even when overall ownership is broad.

metrics.label: History heat
metrics.note: API machinery, controllers, release tooling, and test-infra recur as pressure zones.

metrics.label: Active-inference confidence
metrics.note: Maintainer specialization patterns are strong enough to make the hotspot ranking legible.

stress.headline: Stress concentrates where subsystem specialization meets release obligations.
stress.narrative: The active-inference view highlights controller and API machinery paths where small contributor pools must absorb high ambiguity under strong compatibility constraints.

hotspots.title: api machinery path
hotspots.detail: Compatibility obligations create repeated prediction error whenever controller-facing schema assumptions move.

hotspots.title: controller logic path
hotspots.detail: Fast-moving control loops create dense change history, but only some of that churn resolves underlying uncertainty.

hotspots.title: release tooling path
hotspots.detail: Stress rises when release readiness depends on a narrow operational review core.

hotspots.note: Schema and compatibility changes ripple across client, server, and docs surfaces.
Frequent logic changes make ownership continuity especially valuable.
Investor-facing story: Vaglio shortens the path from change to trustworthy rollout narrative.

expertise_signals.title: SIG-aligned expertise
expertise_signals.detail: Contributor clusters map cleanly to subsystem-specific knowledge pockets.

expertise_signals.title: Reviewer continuity
expertise_signals.detail: A small set of people repeatedly stabilizes the same risky surfaces across release cycles.

provenance.title: Roundtable-backed triage
provenance.detail: Attach decision history to high-blast-radius changes before they reach release coordination.

provenance.title: Lossy Git merge surfacing
provenance.detail: Show where squash/rebase hides lineage so reviewers know when extra explanation is required.

import_steps.detail: Mirror kubernetes/kubernetes into a Forgejo-hosted demo namespace without bespoke setup.

import_steps.step: Translate Git edge to jj semantics
import_steps.detail: Project refs, pull requests, and merges through the Git↔jj gateway before analysis.
Expose maintainer concentration, expertise signals, hotspots, provenance overlays, and the first stress/heat surface on the same host.
